metadata.speaker: Trump
metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: Trump criticizes NATO, considers US withdrawal from alliance

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: He says Iran now incapable of developing nuclear weapons

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: Change in Iran leadership offers deal possibilities, he says

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: WASHINGTON, April 1 (Reuters) - The United States will be "out of Iran pretty quickly" and could return for "spot hits" if needed, President Donald Trump told Reuters on Wednesday, hours before he was scheduled to make a primetime address to the nation about the war.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: With the conflict in its fifth week and Trump under pressure for an off-ramp amid rising gasoline prices, the president scheduled a 9 p.m. EDT (0100 GMT) speech to discuss the way forward. His address will end a day that began with Trump making a historic visit to the Supreme Court.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: The Reuters Iran Briefing newsletter keeps you informed with the latest developments and analysis of the Iran war. Sign up here.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: Trump, in a phone interview with Reuters, said one element of his speech would be to express his disgust with NATO for what he considers the alliance's lack of support for U.S. objectives in Iran.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: A transatlantic rift in Trump's second term deepened after European allies rebuffed his request to help maintain safe passage for oil traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: He said he was "absolutely" considering withdrawing the United States from NATO, a treaty organization ratified by the U.S. Senate in 1949. Trump has flirted with a withdrawal in the past and has successfully pressured NATO members to increase their defense spending.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: "They haven't been friends when we needed them," Trump said. "We've never asked them for much ... it's a one-way street."

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: Trump and his top officials have offered a variety of timelines for ending the war. He said on Tuesday that the U.S. could end its military campaign against Iran within two to three weeks.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: In the Reuters interview, he declined to provide a timeline.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: "I can't tell you exactly ... we're going to be out pretty quickly," he said, adding that once a U.S. exit is achieved, "we'll come back to do spot hits" on Iranian targets as needed.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: The war has spread across the Middle East, killing thousands of people and causing soaring energy prices that have fueled global inflation fears.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: Two-thirds of Americans believe that the U.S. should work to end its involvement in the Iran war quickly, even if that means not achieving the goals set out by the Trump administration, found a Reuters/Ipsos poll conducted from Friday to Sunday.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: Trump said he hoped for a deal with Iran after the first wave of airstrikes killed Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. A number of other senior Iranian figures have also been killed.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: Mojtaba Khamenei has replaced his father as Iran's supreme leader; the U.S. has said it believes he is wounded and likely disfigured. The country's president and foreign minister remain the same as before the conflict.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: Trump said Iran's leadership was now "totally different people."

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: "I didn't need regime change, but we got it because of the casualties of war. We got it. So we have regime change and the big thing we have is they're not going to have a nuclear weapon," said Trump, adding: "Nor do they want one."

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: The White House has said behind-the-scenes negotiations are ongoing with Iran, a point that Tehran denies. A source briefed on the matter said Vice President JD Vance was talking to intermediaries from Pakistan about the conflict as recently as Tuesday.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: At Trump's direction, Vance signaled privately that Trump was open to a ceasefire as long as certain U.S. demands were met, the source told Reuters on Wednesday.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: "We have had full regime change," Trump said. "I'm dealing with a very good chance that we'll make a deal because they don't want to be blasted anymore."

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: Trump has said a primary aim of launching the war was to prevent Iran from developing a nuclear weapon.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: Almost half of Iran's uranium enriched to up to 60% purity, a short step from weapons-grade, was stored in a tunnel complex at Isfahan and is probably still there, the U.N. nuclear watchdog chief Rafael Grossi said earlier this month.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: The tunnel complex is the only target that appears not to have been badly damaged in attacks last June by Israel and the U.S. on Iran's nuclear facilities.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: Trump said the objective of preventing a nuclear weapon has been achieved, however.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: Of the enriched uranium, Trump said: "That's so far underground, I don't care about that."

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: "We'll always be watching it by satellite," he added.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: He said Iran was "incapable" of developing a weapon now.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: Iran has long denied wanting to develop a nuclear weapon and says its nuclear program is peaceful.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: The International Atomic Energy Agency estimates that when Israel launched its first attacks in June, Iran had 440.9 kg of 60% uranium. If enriched further, that would provide the explosive needed for 10 nuclear weapons, according to an IAEA yardstick.

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters

chunks.text: Reporting by Steve Holland; Writing by Katharine Jackson and Steve Holland, editing by Michelle Nichols and Rosalba O'Brien

metadata.title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters
